LAW AND MOTION 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DISCOVERY 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY, TO ESTABLISH ADMISSIONS FROM DEFENDANT AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT MICHAEL DEAN METZ IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE COURT AWARDED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $617.50 TO BE PAID BY MARCH 17, 2011. RESPONSE TO BE PROVIDED BY MARCH 10, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED

PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189(301/PJB)

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDRES SANCHEZ OF MC HALL & ASSOCIATES,TEL. NO. 512-9865 X314 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions against Defendant Michael Dean Metz is Granted, no opposition was filed. The court awarded sanctions in the amount of $617.50 to be paid by March 17, 2011. Response to be provided by March 10, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J.
